message:
Add PWA manifest, icons, and metadata

- Add manifest.json with app name, icons, theme color, display settings
- Create SVG icons (192x192, 512x512) with JFP branding
- Add PWA meta tags to layout.tsx (manifest, themeColor, appleWebApp, icons)
- Add markdown export path to core package exports
- Add BasketSidebar component for basket functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="192" height="192" viewBox="0 0 192 192">
+  <defs>
+    <linearGradient id="grad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
+      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#8b5cf6"/>
+      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#3b82f6"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+  </defs>
+  <rect width="192" height="192" rx="32" fill="url(#grad)"/>
+  <text x="96" y="115" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif" font-size="80" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle" fill="white">JP</text>
+</svg>

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
+  <defs>
+    <linearGradient id="grad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
+      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#8b5cf6"/>
+      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#3b82f6"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+  </defs>
+  <rect width="512" height="512" rx="85" fill="url(#grad)"/>
+  <text x="256" y="310" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif" font-size="220" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle" fill="white">JP</text>
+</svg>

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+{
+  "name": "Jeffrey's Prompts",
+  "short_name": "JFP",
+  "description": "Curated prompts for agentic coding. Browse, copy, install as Claude Code skills.",
+  "start_url": "/",
+  "display": "standalone",
+  "background_color": "#ffffff",
+  "theme_color": "#8b5cf6",
+  "icons": [
+    {
+      "src": "/icons/icon-192x192.svg",
+      "sizes": "192x192",
+      "type": "image/svg+xml",
+      "purpose": "any"
+    },
+    {
+      "src": "/icons/icon-512x512.svg",
+      "sizes": "512x512",
+      "type": "image/svg+xml",
+      "purpose": "any"
+    }
+  ],
+  "categories": ["developer tools", "productivity"],
+  "orientation": "portrait-primary",
+  "scope": "/",
+  "lang": "en-US",
+  "dir": "ltr"
+}
